name: CurveSimplifyOptions
summary: Enumerates the options to use when simplifying a curve.

enum_values.name: SplitAtFullyMultipleKnots
enum_values.summary: Split NurbsCurves at fully multiple knots. Effectively turning single NURBS segments with kinks into multiple segments.

enum_values.name: RebuildArcs
enum_values.summary: Replace partially circular segments with ArcCurves.

enum_values.name: RebuildRationals
enum_values.summary: Replace rational NURBS curve with constant weights with an equivalent non-rational NurbsCurve.

enum_values.name: AdjustG1
enum_values.summary: Adjust segments that are G1 to each other. Segments might only be G1 within tolerance. This can affect downstream operations, such as offsetting. So, if G1 within tolerance, adjust segments so to be exactly G1.

enum_values.name: Merge
enum_values.summary: Merge adjacent co-linear lines or co-circular arcs or combine consecutive line segments into a polyline.

enum_values.name: All
enum_values.summary: Implies all of the simplification functions will be used.
